cards.title: Compiler Pipeline
cards.governance_note: Map source, lexing, parsing, semantic analysis, IR, optimization, code generation, linking, loading, and execution.

cards.title: Interpreter
cards.governance_note: Document runtime evaluation rules, diagnostics, environment, and side-effect boundaries.

cards.title: Runtime System
cards.governance_note: Review memory, errors, concurrency, sandboxing, diagnostics, and observability.

cards.title: Build Governance
cards.governance_note: Preserve dependencies, toolchains, scripts, checksums, provenance, signatures, and release notes.
